result:
Clean rebuild succeeds with zero errors — the only warning is a pre-existing, unrelated one in `wpa_cli.c` (logical-not precedence), not touched by this change.

Summary of changes:
- `src/drivers/driver.h`: replaced `int qual; int noise;` in `struct wpa_scan_res` with `struct { int qual; int noise; } sig;`, updated doc comment.
- Updated all `wpa_scan_res` usage sites: `wpa_supplicant/scan.c`, `bss.c`, `events.c`, `src/drivers/driver_bsd.c`, `driver_wext.c`, `driver_nl80211_scan.c` (→ `.sig.qual` / `.sig.noise`).
- Left `struct wpa_bss`'s own `qual`/`noise` fields (in `bss.h`, `ctrl_iface.c`, `dbus_old_handlers.c`) untouched since they're a separate, unrelated struct — only `bss.c`'s copy-from-scan-result assignment was updated on the source side.

`wpa_supplicant/` builds fully green.
